Game-Winning Buzzer-Beaters

Below is a list of every game-winning shot in NBA/BAA history that was taken with the shooter's team tied or trailing and left no time on the clock after it went through. For more background on the data and methods, please see this blog post.
Player name suffix (n) indicates player's nth career game-winner Game link suffix p indicates playoff game
Location=N indicates neutral court game
NBA/BAA
ABA

860 Buzzer-Beaters

860 Buzzer-Beaters Table
